meaning: adj.常绿的n.常绿树,常绿植物
examples: Plant evergreen shrubs around the end of the month.
Many of these plants are evergreen, so you can enjoy them all year round.
It was somewhat disguised from the road in passing it by yews and evergreen oaks, but it was visible enough up here.
In 2011, Massachusetts based Evergreen Solar moved all of its production to China.
Workers hosed off the snow on the stand of evergreen trees beyond the center-field wall.
